The latest announcement is out from Manuka Resources Ltd ( (AU:MKR) ).

Manuka Resources has issued 5,383,333 fully paid ordinary shares following the exercise of unlisted options due to expire in May 2026. The shares were issued without a prospectus under Australian Corporations Act provisions, with the company confirming compliance with continuous disclosure obligations and stating there is no additional information required for investors to assess the new shares.

The announcement indicates a modest expansion of Manuka’s share capital as options are converted into equity, potentially strengthening its capital base without undertaking a new public offering. By affirming regulatory compliance and the absence of undisclosed material information, the company aims to reassure existing and prospective shareholders about transparency and the routine nature of this capital management step.

More about Manuka Resources Ltd

Manuka Resources Limited is an Australian resources company listed on the ASX and NZX. The company is involved in the exploration and development of mineral assets, operating within the broader mining and resources sector.

data.title: Digitide Sets Up ESOP Trust to Implement 2026 Stock Option Scheme
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Digitide Solutions Ltd ( (IN:DIGITIDE) ) has provided an announcement.

Digitide Solutions Limited has established the “Digitide ESOP Trust” to administer and implement its Employee Stock Option Scheme 2026 and any future stock option plans. The move, executed through a registered trust deed submitted under SEBI’s share-based employee benefit regulations, formalizes the governance framework for equity-based compensation and signals a structured approach to employee incentivization and long-term alignment with shareholder interests.

By creating a dedicated ESOP trust in compliance with the 2021 SEBI norms, Digitide aims to streamline the management of its stock option programs and enhance transparency in how equity awards are handled. This development is likely to support talent retention and attraction in the competitive tech sector, while reinforcing the company’s adherence to regulatory best practices in employee compensation and corporate governance.

More about Digitide Solutions Ltd

Digitide Solutions Limited is an India-based technology company headquartered in Bengaluru, Karnataka, operating in the information technology and software services sector. Listed on both BSE and NSE under the symbol DIGITIDE, the company focuses on providing digital and IT solutions, positioning itself within the country’s growing tech and innovation ecosystem.

Average Trading Volume: 29,309

Technical Sentiment Signal: Strong Sell

Current Market Cap: 14.14B INR

data.title: Underwood Capital Director Increases Indirect Shareholding
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Hygrovest Limited ( (AU:UWC) ) has provided an update.

Underwood Capital Limited has reported a change in the relevant interests of director Warwick Sauer, disclosed via an update to the Australian Securities Exchange. Sauer’s indirect holding is through Baauer Pty Ltd as trustee for the Baauer Family Trust, where he is a shareholder, director, and beneficiary.

The disclosure shows on-market acquisitions of 75,000 and 14,606 fully paid ordinary shares on 16 and 20 April 2026 respectively, for total consideration of about $4,342.56. Following these trades, Sauer’s indirect interest increased from 1,838,287 to 1,927,893 shares, signaling a modest but clear strengthening of his equity position in the company.

More about Hygrovest Limited

Underwood Capital Limited, formerly known as Hygrovest Limited, is an Australian-listed investment company. It holds and manages equity positions, with directors and related entities often maintaining significant shareholdings that align their interests with those of other investors.

An announcement from Storskogen Group AB Class B ( ($SE:STOR.B) ) is now available.

Storskogen Group AB, a Nasdaq Stockholm-listed industrial group active across trade, industry and services, focuses on long-term ownership of leading small and medium-sized businesses in selected sectors. With approximately 10,500 employees and SEK 33 billion in net sales, the company has built a diversified portfolio that underpins its role as a significant consolidator in its markets.

The company will publish its interim report for the first quarter of 2026 on 29 April at 07:00 CEST, followed by an English-language presentation and Q&A with the CEO and CFO at 09:00 CEST via webcast and telephone conference. By offering broad access to the presentation and making materials available on its website afterward, Storskogen is aiming to maintain high transparency and engagement with investors and other stakeholders ahead of a potentially market-moving earnings update.

data.title: OMV sets May 27 date for 2026 AGM in Vienna with full governance agenda
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

OMV AG ( (DE:OMV) ) has shared an announcement.

OMV has convened its 2026 annual general meeting for May 27 in Vienna as an in-person event, with a partial public webcast of the executive board’s report on the 2025 financial year. Shareholders of record on May 17 will be able to attend or vote by proxy, with detailed procedures set out for deposit confirmations, proxy appointments and the exercise of participation rights.

Key items on the agenda include approval of 2025 financial statements, allocation of 2025 profits and dividend timing, discharge of board members, election of auditors and supervisory board members, and changes to the articles of association. The company also highlights regulatory-driven governance and data protection provisions, underscoring its focus on compliant shareholder engagement and the expected slight reduction in treasury shares as stock is used for bonus and long-term incentive plans.

The most recent analyst rating on (DE:OMV) stock is a Buy with a EUR68.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on OMV AG stock, see the DE:OMV Stock Forecast page.

More about OMV AG

OMV Aktiengesellschaft is an integrated energy and chemicals group based in Vienna, operating primarily in oil, gas and related downstream activities. Its shares are listed on the Vienna Stock Exchange, and the company has a broad international shareholder base focused on European energy markets.

Average Trading Volume: 442,889

Current Market Cap: €18.71B

Seibu Holdings, Inc. ( (JP:9024) ) just unveiled an announcement.

Seibu Holdings Inc. announced that its consolidated subsidiary Seibu Real Estate Inc. has issued a change notice regarding its previously disclosed tender offer for shares of e’grand Co., Ltd., securities code 3294. The amendments affect certain items in the original March 31, 2026 tender offer announcement and the April 1, 2026 public notice, following the filing of an amended tender offer registration statement.

The company indicated that detailed revisions are set out in a separate change notice released by Seibu Real Estate on April 22, 2026, and disclosed this information in line with Securities Listing Regulations and the Financial Instruments and Exchange Act. The update signals an adjustment in the terms or conditions of the planned acquisition of e’grand shares, with potential implications for the transaction’s execution and stakeholders monitoring Seibu’s real estate investment strategy.
